function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; must verify final written record without rewriting and ensure deletion precondition is satisfied.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbound file to verify checklist items
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbound file content: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first among selected oldest pair; recipient matches canonical Miles email; subject quoted correctly.
next_step.observation: Read-back of outbox file confirms final draft exists with two invoice attachments and recipient miles@novak.example.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed inbox request by drafting reply with correct two invoices and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md was deleted after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the inbound request by preparing a reply draft to Miles with the oldest 2 Claudia-linked invoices attached, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant nested AGENTS and workflow docs, used inbox header as canonical metadata, verified sender identity via canonical cast primary_contact_email, created outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox with runtime timestamped filename and YAML-safe quoted subject, ordered attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email explicitly requested: 'Reply back with the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia.' Preflight listed Claudia-linked invoices; the two oldest by issue date are 2025-12-18 (INV-0006) and 2026-01-19 (INV-0007). Both source files were read, no security trigger conditions were present, and sender miles@novak.example matched canonical 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. A compliant outbound draft was written at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with those two attachments (newest-first ordering per rule), then the processed inbox file was removed.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity records for miles and claudia
read invoice files INV-0006 and INV-0007
